item.kubejs.titanium_silicon_carbide_max: Titanium Silicon Carbide MAX Phase Ingot
trait.gigani.aeroelastic.desc: Light aerospace behavior: excellent handling and projectile response, weaker as a bunker wall.
trait.gigani.aerospace_grade.desc: A high strength-to-weight build that rewards fast tools, bows, and lighter armor plans.
trait.gigani.alpha_beta_phase.desc: A balanced titanium phase mix: good speed, useful impact, and reliable toughness without becoming heavy.
trait.gigani.amalgamating.desc: Binds loose metal phases together, attracting metal drops and improving repair/enchant response.
trait.gigani.anassonium_flux.desc: Exotic reactor crystal flux boosts charging, magic defense, and spell damage, but demands stable supporting materials.
trait.gigani.arc_focus.desc: Focuses magic through a stable lattice, improving enchantability and direct spell damage scaling.
trait.gigani.auric_phase.desc: Gold-rich titanium phases tune enchantment and magic flow, trading some raw structure for clean response.
trait.gigani.bearing_surface.desc: Designed for contact surfaces and moving assemblies, great in bindings and grips.
trait.gigani.beta_elastic.desc: Springy beta-phase titanium behavior that improves recovery, speed, and fall tolerance.
trait.gigani.bioaccumulative.desc: Powerful but dirty chemistry. Raises toxic and magic output at a cost to luck and long-term integrity.
trait.gigani.biomimetic.desc: Organic structure that self-adjusts under stress, strong for linings, grips, and repair builds.
trait.gigani.boride_ceramic.desc: A brutal high-temperature ceramic phase: very tough, very heat-stable, and not especially forgiving.
trait.gigani.boss_calibrated.desc: Weighted for boss-scale punishment instead of ordinary mining errands.
trait.gigani.brittle_cleavage.desc: A sharp but fracture-prone cleavage plane. Great bite and focus, poor abuse tolerance.
trait.gigani.carbide_edge.desc: A hard cutting phase that bites into blocks and armor, trading some handling for edge retention.
trait.gigani.cascade_forged.desc: A second-order alloy built from other serious alloys; expensive because it is meant to be.
trait.gigani.catalyst_poisoned.desc: A poisoned catalytic surface: brutal magic/toxin output at a real repair penalty.
trait.gigani.catalyst_surface.desc: Chemically active surfaces that improve repair loops and weird machine-adjacent magic.
trait.gigani.catalytic.desc: Catalyzes repair, enchanting, and ore handling. A practical chemistry trait rather than flavor text.
trait.gigani.chronal_temper.desc: Time-steel tempering rewards clean timing: faster handling, better draw, and sharper mining without much bulk.
trait.gigani.cold_flow.desc: Slowly migrates under stress. It recovers small damage but loses stiffness under heavy armor loads.
trait.gigani.compressive_skin.desc: A dense outer skin that resists dents and knockback, at the cost of nimble handling.
trait.gigani.conductive_grain.desc: Aligned conductive grain channels charge, ranged pressure, and redstone responsiveness.
trait.gigani.conductive_path.desc: Channels energy cleanly through the part, raising speed, draw response, and ranged output.
trait.gigani.corrosion_proof.desc: Resists chemical attack and strange-world exposure, improving armor durability and magic protection.
trait.gigani.creep_resistant.desc: Stays strong under heat and load. Great for armor and machine-forged late tools.
trait.gigani.cryostable.desc: Stays stable under thermal shock, useful for reactor fuel, cold metals, and strange dimensional materials.
trait.gigani.crystalline_focus.desc: A clear crystal lattice that concentrates enchantment, spell damage, and projectile precision.
trait.gigani.diboride_edge.desc: Extremely hard boride cutting geometry. Terrifying edge performance, poor forgiveness.
trait.gigani.dimensional_capacitance.des: Stores strange-space energy and releases it through ranged and magic channels.
trait.gigani.dimensional_memory.desc: Remembers where it has been. Better enchantment, projectile accuracy, and cross-dimensional stability.
trait.gigani.ductile_phase.desc: Bends before it breaks. Better repair and resilience, weaker edge pressure.
trait.gigani.eddy_current.desc: Induces drag in targets and moving mechanisms, slowing enemies while boosting ranged control.
trait.gigani.edge_retention.desc: Keeps a working edge under long mining runs and boss armor abuse.
trait.gigani.elastomeric.desc: Rubbery rebound for grips, linings, cords, and parts that should absorb abuse instead of shattering.
trait.gigani.electroductile.desc: Conductive without being crumbly, favoring fast tools, bows, and charged part roles.
trait.gigani.embrittling_phase.desc: A hard but brittle phase. Great immediate bite, worse survivability.
trait.gigani.entropy_stabilized.desc: A complex high-entropy structure that makes superalloys unusually stable across many stresses.
trait.gigani.fatigue_limit.desc: Excellent cyclic fatigue behavior. Randomly prevents durability loss and supports long trips.
trait.gigani.ferroelastic.desc: Elastic domain switching that recovers shape and improves safe movement in armor pieces.
trait.gigani.fracture_tough.desc: Resists crack growth under load, making high-end metals less likely to fail under abuse.
trait.gigani.galling_resistant.desc: Resists seizing and metal pickup, making handles, bindings, and fast weapons smoother.
trait.gigani.gamma_bite.desc: Energetic and ugly. Higher bite and magic damage, lower finesse.
trait.gigani.grain_boundary_pinned.desc: Pinned grain boundaries improve toughness and durability without much speed loss.
trait.gigani.grain_refined.desc: A tighter grain structure that improves handling and durability without making the part magically stronger.
trait.gigani.heat_sunk.desc: Moves heat away from the working edge, improving toughness and magic protection without feeling light.
trait.gigani.heavy_amalgam.desc: Dense amalgam mass. More toughness and impact, less speed and luck.
trait.gigani.high_density.desc: Dense and punishing. More impact, armor, and toughness, but slower weapon handling.
trait.gigani.inert_matrix.desc: Chemically stubborn and stable. Better durability, armor durability, and repair consistency.
trait.gigani.inertial_drive.desc: Stores mechanical impulse and throws it back into the swing, making heavy late-game alloys hit and mine harder.
trait.gigani.ion_channel.desc: Moves ions and charge fast enough to feel like tool haste when held.
trait.gigani.lightframe.desc: A structural light-frame effect: quick, agile, and bow-friendly, but not a heavy tank shell.
trait.gigani.liquid_metal.desc: Flows into cracks and moving joints, making rods and bindings smoother while weakening armor roles.
trait.gigani.low_friction.desc: A slick bearing surface that improves harvest speed, draw speed, and repair feel.
trait.gigani.martensitic_temper.desc: Heat-treated steel structure with a hard bite, good toughness, and slightly harsher handling.
trait.gigani.matrix_bound.desc: Hard particles locked into a steel matrix, splitting the difference between brute durability and crystal focus.
trait.gigani.max_phase_laminate.desc: A ceramic-metal laminate that keeps ceramic hardness while flexing like a metal.
trait.gigani.memory_phase.desc: A quieter shape-memory phase tuned for precision, resilience, and controlled movement.
trait.gigani.molybdenum_stabilized.desc: High-temperature stabilization. Tough and creep-resistant, but a touch slower.
trait.gigani.mox_burn.desc: Mixed-oxide reactor bite: dangerous, heavy, magically hot, and better kept out of early-game hands.
trait.gigani.neutron_absorber.desc: A shielding phase suited to reactor materials, biased toward armor and survival over speed.
trait.gigani.nitride_coating.desc: A hard ceramic nitride face that improves cutting and weapon enchants while feeling brittle.
trait.gigani.noble_catalyst.desc: Noble-metal catalytic behavior that improves enchanting, luck, and clean magic transfer.
trait.gigani.occult_conduit.desc: A hostile but useful channel for occult power, raising magic damage and ranged force.
trait.gigani.oxide_skin.desc: A stable oxide layer. Fireproofs the item and trims fire damage when used as armor.
trait.gigani.phase_anchor.desc: Stabilizes gear across portal math, improving magic armor and ranged force.
trait.gigani.phase_tuned.desc: Sits slightly out of phase, improving reach and ranged precision for portal, ender, and dimensional parts.
trait.gigani.piezoelectric.desc: Stress becomes charge. Fast strikes and arrows benefit more than heavy armor does.
trait.gigani.planar_shear.desc: Cuts along dimensional stress lines. Excellent magic pressure, slightly unstable durability.
trait.gigani.polymer_buffer.desc: Synthetic buffering that dampens impacts and weird energy, but does not turn plastic into sword steel.
trait.gigani.powder_metallurgy.desc: Fine, controlled grain distribution that rewards high-end composite and carbide recipes.
trait.gigani.precipitation_hardened.desc: Fine precipitates strengthen a light alloy, giving speed without letting it fold like foil.
trait.gigani.precision_ground.desc: A carefully ground edge and alignment: faster ore work, cleaner ranged accuracy, less waste.
trait.gigani.quench_hardened.desc: Rapidly hardened steel structure: higher bite and toughness, with slightly harsher handling.
trait.gigani.quicksilver.desc: Fast and fluid. Improves handling, draw speed, and mining pace, but hurts structure and protection.
trait.gigani.radiant_matrix.desc: A luminous noble-metal lattice that rewards enchanting, luck, and light-aspected magic.
trait.gigani.radiant_temper.desc: Light-bearing temper that rewards enchanted and spell-oriented builds more than raw chopping.
trait.gigani.reaction_sintered.desc: High-temperature sintering locks hard phases into place: durable, wear-resistant, and not especially graceful.
trait.gigani.reactor_shielding.desc: A dense shielding phase for radioactive and reactor materials, built for armor and magic soak.
trait.gigani.reactor_temper.desc: Reactor-grade structure biased toward shielding, ugly impact strength, and survival under bad energy.
trait.gigani.redox_active.desc: Electrochemical activity that helps reactions, speed, and repair loops.
trait.gigani.redox_cycle.desc: Reactive chemistry that accelerates work and magic, but slowly dirties the structure.
trait.gigani.refractory.desc: Keeps strength under extreme heat, improving toughness and magic armor while staying heavy-handed.
trait.gigani.resonance_tuned.desc: A tuned lattice for precision arrows, spell channeling, and high-enchant crystal builds.
trait.gigani.resonant_damping.desc: Damps shock, blast, and vibration with a tuned internal phase.
trait.gigani.resonant_lattice.desc: A tuned crystal or noble-metal lattice that improves accuracy, projectile speed, and spell channeling.
trait.gigani.rose_lattice.desc: Rose quartz lattice strain adds gentle resonance: excellent settings, fletching, spell tools, and precision parts.
trait.gigani.rutile_refraction.desc: High-index rutile focuses light and arcane charge, improving ranged precision and spell bite while staying brittle.
trait.gigani.scintillating.desc: A bright, high-energy lattice that improves luck and enchantment throughput.
trait.gigani.self_lubricating.desc: Reduces friction at the working surface, helping tools feel smoother and last longer.
trait.gigani.shape_memory.desc: Returns toward its trained shape, improving repair behavior and occasionally knitting damage back together.
trait.gigani.soulbound_matrix.desc: Spiritual binding that favors repair, magic defense, and persistence over raw speed.
trait.gigani.springback.desc: Shape-memory recovery that helps parts return to form after impact.
trait.gigani.superalloy_creep.desc: Refuses to sag under heat and time, making it excellent for late industrial tools and armor.
trait.gigani.superconductive.desc: Near-lossless energy flow for fast tools, bows, and charged magical parts.
trait.gigani.surface_passivated.desc: Forms a protective oxide surface that resists corrosion, magic abrasion, and minor heat damage.
trait.gigani.surgical_grade.desc: Clean, biocompatible finishing. Full armor sets provide light regeneration and better magic defense.
trait.gigani.temporal_inertia.desc: Resists sudden failure by spreading impact through a delayed lattice, increasing toughness and durability.
trait.gigani.terminus_cascade.desc: The final alloy cascade: absurd, deliberate, and only reasonable after the pack has already shown its teeth.
trait.gigani.thermal_barrier.desc: A dedicated heat barrier for armor and coatings.
trait.gigani.thermal_shock.desc: Handles sudden temperature changes and turns heat stress into impact strength.
trait.gigani.titaniferous_feedstock.desc: Titanium-bearing oxide phases add toughness and repair response, but the mineral grit slightly slows fine handling.
trait.gigani.tool_steel.desc: A practical tool-steel profile: stronger edge pressure and toughness without magical sparkle.
trait.gigani.toxic_leach.desc: Leaches toxic material into enemies. More damage and spell pressure, slightly worse handling.
trait.gigani.toxic_vapor.desc: A poisonous vapor phase. Weapons leach toxins into targets while sacrificing clean handling.
trait.gigani.turbine_bred.desc: Built for hot rotating machinery, translating high-end metallurgy into speed and hard impacts.
trait.gigani.vacuum_cast.desc: Cleaner casting with fewer inclusions, improving enchant response and reducing random damage loss.
trait.gigani.vanadium_refined.desc: Refines grain size and edge strength, giving tools bite without making them clumsy.
trait.gigani.viscoelastic.desc: Absorbs impacts and rebounds, improving armor durability and handling in soft composites.
trait.gigani.void_latched.desc: Anchors gear against dimensional shear, improving magic defense and ranged force at a handling cost.
trait.gigani.void_tempered.desc: Ender-stable material that protects against strange damage and turns distance into force.
trait.gigani.waveform_harmonics.desc: A resonant waveform that turns precision into spell pressure and projectile accuracy.
trait.gigani.wear_resistant.desc: Resists abrasion and reduces durability loss, especially on long mining or boss fights.
trait.gigani.work_hardened.desc: Hardens through deformation. Stronger hit and toughness, lower repair grace and handling.
